title: Abemaciclib plus fulvestrant in treating hormone-receptor positive, HER2-negative advanced breast cancer-comparing real-world outcomes in England to the MONARCH-2 trial.
abstract: Abemaciclib plus fulvestrant was approved in Europe following publication of the MONARCH-2 trial and recommended to enter the NICE Cancer Drugs Fund for HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer. We aimed to assess MONARCH-2 generalisability to England clinical practice using real-world NHS trust data.
